description: Emit the PCR-setup (thermocycler) Opentrons Protocol API v2 template (.py) into the record store.
rules: read-only — produces a local file, controls no hardware
pure Python stdlib — copies the vendored pcr_setup_template.py
writes record_store/pcr_setup.py (master-mix distribution, sample addition, thermocycler cycling)
usage: No vars required. Output: pcr_setup.py — edit it, then run the `simulate` perk.
limitation: Emits a static template only; it does not customize cycle counts, temperatures, or sample counts.
